description_long: This object is a vintage computer monitor with a bulky, off-white plastic casing and a convex glass screen. The front features a large, dark display area framed by a thick bezel, with three small colored indicators (red, blue, yellow) in the upper right corner and a circular power button below the screen. The base is rectangular and slightly protrudes, housing a vented speaker grille and a floppy disk drive slot, both detailed in blue and white. A matching, rounded mouse is positioned nearby, suggesting the monitor is part of a desktop computer setup. The sides and top of the monitor are plain, with visible seams and a few screws, and the overall surface shows signs of wear and subtle discoloration. The design is reminiscent of early personal computers from the 1980s, with a utilitarian, robust appearance suitable for public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A vintage, off-white computer monitor with a thick bezel, convex screen, and a rectangular base featuring a speaker grille and floppy drive slot. Includes a matching rounded mouse and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Rear-top view showing the slanted, plain back of the monitor and the top of the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's depth, visible screws, and the mouse placed beside the base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the convex screen, thick bezel with colored indicators, power button, speaker grille, floppy drive slot, and the mouse.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the monitor's profile, base extension, and the mouse positioned to the right.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, off-white plastic with slightly rounded corners and a matte finish. It features three small colored indicators in the upper right and a circular power button below the screen, with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by a wide, rectangular flat base integrated with the main body, made of the same off-white plastic and featuring a blue accent panel. No visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single circular power button is located below the screen, centered on the lower bezel.
